raw_consumer_statement: I created an XXXX account because I got a notification that my credit score had dropped. I discovered a CitiBank credit card account had been opened in XXXX, 5 years before I was even born, with me as an authorized user. As far as I can tell, this amount has been accumulating interest for months to the final amount of {$8600.00} as of XX/XX/XXXX. My credit report states that I am using 47 % of my credit, which is not accurate at all ; the only credit card I have is through XXXX. I called CitiBank and they told me they couldn't help me because I don't have an account, and I told them that that was the whole issue -- I do not have an account, but I'm an authorized user on a fraudulent account that is affecting my credit. I have filed a report with the FTC, frozen my credit on XXXX  and XXXX, filed a dispute with XXXX, and I am about to file a police report.
